instruction: Create an RNA duplex with sequence AUUGGUT
Zoom the camera to 0.7x
Color the 5' end of every strand blue (0x0000ff).
output: var color = new THREE.Color(0x0000ff); systems[0].strands.forEach(s => { var e = s.end5; s.system.fillVec('nsColors', 3, e.sid, [color.r, color.g, color.b]); }); systems[0].callUpdates(['instanceColor']); render();

instruction: Highlight the 3' ends of all strands in the system.
Highlight the 5' ends of all strands in the system.
Add an ambient light with color 0xFC0104 and intensity 0.7
output: var l = new THREE.AmbientLight(0xFC0104, 0.7); scene.add(l); render();

instruction: Toggle nucleotide base colors.
Select element with ID 589.
Toggle the visibility of the strand containing element 626.
Create an RNA strand with sequence AUCGC
Select the first and last strand
Skip (delete and ligate) elements [1918, 932, 1440].
Color strands longer than 5 viridis
output: var color = new THREE.Color('viridis'); systems[0].strands.forEach(s => { if(s.getLength() > 5) { s.getMonomers().forEach(e => { s.system.fillVec('nsColors', 3, e.sid, [color.r, color.g, color.b]); }); } }); systems[0].callUpdates(['instanceColor']); render();

instruction: Toggle visibility of all elements.
Split the strand at element 1485.
Delete the element with ID 1857.
Color every even nucleotide red (0xff0000) and odd nucleotide green (0x00ff00).
output: var red = 0xff0000; var green = 0x00ff00; var sys = systems[0]; sys.getMonomers().forEach(e => { var color = (e.id % 2 === 0) ? red : green; var c = new THREE.Color(color); sys.fillVec('nsColors', 3, e.sid, [c.r, c.g, c.b]); }); sys.callUpdates(['instanceColor']); render();

instruction: Insert sequence 'UTU' at element 792.
Count the number of strands of each length in the system.
Set the background color to 0x6385ED
Set the sequence of elements [1937, 1134, 1217] to 'CCU'.
Add a point light at -48.4, -79.0, -82.9 with color 0x044FFC and intensity 0.7
output: var l = new THREE.PointLight(0x044FFC, 0.7); l.position.set(-48.4, -79.0, -82.9); scene.add(l); render();

instruction: Return the IDs of all 3' end nucleotides.
Nick the strand at element 804.
Generate a 28 nucleotide duplex with sequence 'TAUGTUUTUACTTCTCGTACCAUGGCCC'.
Switch the camera mode between Perspective and Orthographic.
Show mean orientation for elements [866, 382, 654]
Extend the strand at element 1785 with sequence 'TCTCAT'.
Hide strands shorter than 22
output: systems[0].strands.forEach(s => { if(s.getLength() < 22) { s.getMonomers().forEach(e => { s.system.fillVec('visibility', 3, e.sid, [0,0,0]); }); } }); systems[0].callUpdates(['instanceVisibility']); render();

instruction: Add a cube of size 0.21 at 39.1, -69.3, -34.2 with color 0x013419
output: var g = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.21, 0.21, 0.21); var m = new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({color: 0x013419}); var mesh = new THREE.Mesh(g, m); mesh.position.set(39.1, -69.3, -34.2); scene.add(mesh); render();

instruction: Find and center view on element 437.
Join strand 1194 and strand 697 (ligate 3' of 1194 to 5' of 697).
output: var s1 = systems[0].strands.find(s => s.id == 1194); var s2 = systems[0].strands.find(s => s.id == 697); if(s1 && s2) edit.ligate(s1.end3, s2.end5);

instruction: Rotate the camera by -20.8 degrees around the X axis and -51.5 degrees around the Y axis
output: camera.rotateX(-20.8 * Math.PI / 180); camera.rotateY(-51.5 * Math.PI / 180); camera.updateProjectionMatrix(); render();

instruction: Trace the strand from 3' to 5' starting at element 583.
Trace the strand from 5' to 3' starting at element 234.
Show everything in the scene.
Toggle visibility of elements with IDs [1019, 977, 1830]
Connect 3' ends of strand 533 and strand 1380 with a duplex
Set the color map bounds from 2.95 to 6.04
Translate system 743 by 29.2, 30.4, 10.8
output: var sys = systems[743]; if(sys) { sys.strands.forEach(s => s.getMonomers().forEach(e => e.translatePosition(new THREE.Vector3(29.2,30.4,10.8)))); sys.callUpdates(['instanceOffset']); render(); }
